title: a candidate the model cannot fix (leaked markers) escalates rather than guessing
notes: Outcome regression: when the model emits leaked conflict markers every retry, capybase must ESCALATE (never guess a broken merge). The runner injects a client returning a marker-leaking candidate and asserts the step escalates. The expected outcome is escalation, not a resolved text; the top-level reason is generic ('could not resolve <unit>'), so no reason substring is asserted — the escalation itself is the contract.
